status_detail: B36 schema upgrade VERIFIED on wire. 3-chunk emission target met: (1) handshake 147B, (2) content 869B, (3) completion 133B verbatim `[null,["c_6b0496818e3449c9","r_1570f2f37bea4329"],{"26":"53a0ebb9312a446ff277d20762ed4f3c","44":false}]` -- the {26: continuation_token, 44: false} marker was the test-PC recommendation from #629 and engine successfully emits it now. Total body 1149B. All hex IDs valid (r_1570f2f37bea4329, c_6b0496818e3449c9, rc_1b740e3b373d442c). Warning text in correct rc slot of content chunk. HOWEVER warning still NOT rendered in UI: page remained on default landing screen with 4 tool buttons; no chat thread; no warning bubble; prompt text un-cleared in input. Renderer drops silently (no thrown exception tied to rc chunk parsing). Renderer's gating predicate is checking something OTHER than completion-chunk presence. Likely next-iteration culprits: (a) the [1] cardinality / shape of the [0]/[] arrays in chunk #2 inner JSON, (b) the trailing 'null,1,0]' suffix on chunk #2 vs native, (c) the safety annotation 'false,[[[[null,[null,0,\"...\"]]]]]' array nesting depth.

Strong candidates from inner_json structure diff: (a) cardinality arrays [1] / [0] / [] in chunk #2 may need specific values matching native, (b) trailing 'null,1,0]' suffix on chunk #2 may need different terminator (native uses different last 3 elements), (c) safety annotation nesting depth `false,[[[[null,[null,0,"<text>"]]]]]` may need specific structure (4-level vs 3-level array nesting), (d) the rc record 13-element structure ['rc_<hash>',[<text>],null,null,null,null,true,null,[1],'ko',null,null,...meta...] may need additional trailing meta fields.
recommendation_for_dev: B37 priority: byte-level diff content chunk between #630 (B36 869B) and #626 native (capture 1525B for first content chunk). Identify EVERY structural difference. Most likely culprits: cardinality arrays, trailing terminator, safety annotation nesting.

Specifically check chunk #2's last ~50 bytes (suffix). #626 native may have additional metadata that B36 truncates. Try copying native's exact 13+element rc record structure verbatim, only swapping the [<text>] slot.

If diff is large, try opposite approach: copy ENTIRE first content chunk from #626 native verbatim (substituting only the message text in rc record) -- if THAT renders, gradually delete fields to find minimal viable schema.
